content.addFilesSelectTitle: Add files to these scanned paper notes
content.uploadFilesSelectTitle: Choose scanned paper notes to upload
uploadFilesBulletPoints: You can only upload PDF files
If there is a problem with your files during upload, you'll need to resolve these before continuing
content.previewUploadTitle: Preview existing scanned paper notes record
content.uploadFilesExtraParagraph: You can add a note to the patient's electronic health record to say their Lloyd George record is stored in this service. Use SNOMED code 16521000000101.
content.addMoreFilesRadioNoText: No, I don't have anymore scanned paper notes to add for this patient
content.addMoreFilesRadioYesText: Yes, I have more scanned paper notes to add for this patient
content.reviewAssessmentPageTitle: Review the new scanned paper notes
content.stitchedPreviewFirstParagraph: This shows how the final notes will look when combined into a single document.
content.choosePagesToRemoveTitle: Choose the pages you want to remove from these scanned paper notes
content.choosePagesToRemoveWarning: These notes may contain pages for more than one other patient that you want to remove. Only remove pages for one patient at a time.
content.addFilesLinkLabel: Add files to this patient's notes
content.reassignPagesLinkLabel: Reassign pages in these notes to another patient
content.chosenToRemovePagesSubtitle: You have chosen to remove these pages from the scanned paper notes:
content.versionHistoryLinkLabel: View version history for these notes
content.versionHistoryLinkDescription: View or restore other versions if, for example, there's a mistake in these notes.
content.versionHistoryHeader: Version history for scanned paper notes
